unit.name: WP_Http request error response decision
unit.area: src/wp-includes/class-wp-http.php with WP_HTTP_Requests_Hooks, WP_HTTP_Requests_Response, WP_HTTP_Proxy, WP_HTTP_Response, and WP_Http_Cookie support
unit.public_contract: This candidate promotes only the WP_Http::request decision that a response identified as WP_Error after Requests dispatch and http_api_debug returns immediately before nonblocking and response-filter handling. PHP still owns public WP_Http::request ABI, Requests dispatch, exception conversion, WP_Error construction/internals, is_wp_error evaluation, http_api_debug timing/payload, nonblocking response shape, http_response filtering, and native arrays/objects.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass request orchestration, selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit, installed distribution, and live/recorded network parity gates before claiming public PHP ownership.
